entity.summary: Chile-origin cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2016 and operating across multiple Latin American markets through regional CryptoMarket group entities under the cryptomkt.com domain.
entity.notes: Official company and legal pages establish the 2016 Chile origin and identify regional entities in Chile, Brazil, and Colombia. Current legal disclosures also state that a group entity requested Chilean CMF registration for certain financial-technology services, but HEI does not treat an application as an approved regulatory milestone.

expected.summary: Chile-based centralized exchange launched in 2016 and still operating under the CryptoMarket brand.

changes.summary: Chile-origin cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2016 and operating across multiple Latin American markets through regional CryptoMarket group entities under the cryptomkt.com domain.
changes.notes: Official company and legal pages establish the 2016 Chile origin and identify regional entities in Chile, Brazil, and Colombia. Current legal disclosures also state that a group entity requested Chilean CMF registration for certain financial-technology services, but HEI does not treat an application as an approved regulatory milestone.

events.title: CryptoMarket was founded in Chile in 2016
events.description: CryptoMarket began in Chile in 2016 with a regional cryptocurrency-exchange and financial-infrastructure strategy.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: Why CryptoMarket?
evidence.notes: Official company page states that CryptoMarket was born in Chile in 2016.

evidence.title: Por qué CryptoMarket
evidence.notes: Spanish official company page independently confirms the 2016 Chile origin.

evidence.title: CryptoMarket terms and conditions
evidence.notes: Current legal terms identify CryptoMKT SpA in Chile and regional group entities in Brazil and Colombia.

evidence.title: CryptoMarket official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current CryptoMarket identity and active regional platform.
